# Srinivasan KB - Professional Profile

## About
Product professional based in Bangalore specializing in Developer Platforms and B2B SaaS.

At Candescent, I focus on developer experience as a product surface, especially documentation and community. I design systems that help developers build, test, and deploy faster by ensuring they can quickly find answers and stay up to date with the tools and capabilities they rely on.

I believe great developer experience starts with how developers learn. Pushing for reduced time-to-first-success and improved discoverability through robust developer communities.

## Expertise
- Product Strategy: Roadmap Planning, Stakeholder Management, Value Prop Design, PLG.
- Growth & Retention: A/B Testing, Analytics, User Research, CPA Optimization, Community.
- Technical Product: Developer Experience (DX), APIs, SDK Strategy, AI, n8n Automation.

## Professional Experience
### Software Product Owner at Candescent
Sept 2025 - Present
Focusing on developer experience as a product surface, especially documentation and community.

### Product Manager at SurveySparrow
Jan 2023 - Sept 2025
Scaled core products and platform capabilities, from workflow automation to ecosystem integrations, driving product-led growth and enabling extensibility for large-scale enterprise organizations.

### Associate Product Manager at OkCredit
Dec 2021 - Jan 2023
Scaled BNPL financial products to 12,000+ active users. Managed growth and retention strategies for a merchant base of 200,000+ across South India.

### Community Expert at ShareChat
June 2019 - June 2020
Contributor to the product team for the PAN-India launch of Group and Audio Chat features for 14M daily active users.

## Education
- MBA (Marketing & Operations), University of Madras (Apr 2018)
- BE (Electrical & Electronics Engineering), PSR Engineering College (Apr 2016)

## Automation Work
Verified n8n Creator. I build and share open-source automation templates on the n8n library to help teams automate repetitive tasks and leverage AI workflows in their daily operations.
Link: https://n8n.io/creators/srinivasankb/
